@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "etcd-10289-grpc-code-unavailable-instead-canceled",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "etcd: gRPC code Unavailable instead Canceled",
+    "description": "gRPC code Unavailable instead Canceled. Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current etcd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your etcd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nhelm list -n etcd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working etcd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review etcd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant etcd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get configmap -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=etcd\n```\nAfter this PR https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/pull/9178 we get:\n\nIt's in **etcd** running with parameter `--log-package-levels=debug`:\n\n    ..."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for gRPC code Unavailable instead Canceled",
+        "description": "So not sure if I am doing something incorrect or in a different way but I could not reproduce the issue exactly but I do see ```rpc error: code = Unavailable``` (i.e. https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/blob/master/etcdserver/api/v3rpc/util.go#L108 instead of L113 as commented in the issue above) \nThis\n```yaml\nRun below commands on client (a separate VM) on two diff cli:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get events -n etcd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"gRPC code Unavailable instead Canceled\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "So not sure if I am doing something incorrect or in a different way but I could not reproduce the issue exactly but I do see ```rpc error: code = Unavailable``` (i.e.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Run below commands on client (a separate VM) on two diff cli:",
+        "For the etcd client - https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/tree/master/etcdctl"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "etcd",
+      "graduated",
+      "orchestration",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "etcd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Job",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/10289",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd"
+    },
+    "reactions": 13,
+    "comments": 29,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with etcd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-03T06:32:21.024Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
